description: 프롬프트 키워드(디멘션) 정의 스냅샷. 값(코드/이름)은 저장하지 않고 런타임에 DS_SQL 로 동적 해석한다. t_xlig_dimension_list(ML_DS_DIV_CD='DS', DEL_F='N') + t_xlig_query_prompt(label/operator)에서 생성.
value_column_convention: DS_SQL 결과의 첫 컬럼=코드, 둘째 컬럼=이름

dimensions.ds_sql: SELECT MODEL AS CODE, MODEL AS NAME FROM Smart_QuadMax_Mart.dbo.CAR_INFO GROUP BY MODEL ORDER BY 1

    select 'Y' as CD, '반응' as NM
SELECT LOOKUP_CODE "CODE", LOOKUP_DESC "CODE_NM", VAL1 "format" FROM T_LOOKUP_VALUE WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE_ID = 'I_CMS_DATE_TIME' AND DEL_F = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ ASC
SELECT LOOKUP_CODE "CODE", LOOKUP_DESC "CODE_NM", VAL1 "FORMAT",LOOKUP_NM "FORMULA" FROM T_LOOKUP_VALUE WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE_ID LIKE '%I_CMS_DATE_TIME%' AND DEL_F = 'N'

SELECT MAIN_BUY_CHANNEL_NM AS CD 
     , MAIN_BUY_CHANNEL_NM AS CD_NAME
  FROM quadmax.z_cust_info 
 WHERE 1=1 
 GROUP BY MAIN_BUY_CHANNEL_NM

UNION ALL

     , '세탁기24년형' AS CD_NAME 
  FROM DUAL  ;

UNION ALL

  FROM DUAL  ;

select '1' as CD, '미반응' as NM
    union all 
    select '2' as CD, '반응' as NM

SELECT A2.CAMP_ID   AS CD
     , A2.CAMP_NAME AS CD_NAME
  FROM Z_CAMP_CELL_CUST A1
       INNER JOIN t_campaign A2
    ON A1.CAMP_ID = A2.CAMP_ID 
 WHERE 1=1
   AND A1.CAMP_ID LIKE '2023%'
 GROUP BY A2.CAMP_ID   
     , A2.CAMP_NAME

SELECT 1 AS CD
              , 'CODE' AS CD_NAME
     FROM DUAL

SELECT PROJECTID AS CD
      , PROJECTNAME AS CD_NAME
    FROM t_ssbi_containers_index 
  GROUP BY PROJECTID 
      , PROJECTNAME
 ORDER BY 2
select category1,input_keyword from naver_api.lg_keywords_list group by category1

select PROJECTID AS CD
        , PROJECTNAME AS CD_NAME
     from quadmax.T_SSBI_CONTAINERS_INDEX
   group by PROJECTID
        , PROJECTNAME
   order by 2
select CAMP_ID,CAMP_NM from quadmax_sdz.t_campaign where CAMP_GRP_ID ='CPGP202400000006'
select naming from dual

SELECT MYD_BIZPE_IST_CD AS CD
     , MYD_BIZPE_IST_CD AS CD_NAME
   FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.NDMRT206TH
 GROUP BY MYD_BIZPE_IST_CD 
     , MYD_BIZPE_IST_CD

SELECT MYD_INF_OFR_CD AS CD
     , MYD_INF_OFR_CD AS CD_NAME
   FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.NDMRT206TH
 GROUP BY MYD_INF_OFR_CD 
     , MYD_INF_OFR_CD

SELECT 'Y' AS CD
      , 'Y' AS CD_NAME 
  UNION ALL
 SELECT 'N' AS CD
      , 'N' AS CD_NAME

select A.CAMP_ID
     , A.CAMP_NM 
  from quadmax_sdz.z_campaign A
       inner join quadmax_sdz.z_chnl_send_req_cust B
    on A.CAMP_ID = B.CAMP_ID      
where 1 = 1
and A.CAMP_END_DT <= date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') /* 이미 종료된 캠페인만 조회*/
group by CAMP_ID,CAMP_NM
limit 10

SELECT * 
   FROM TEST A
WHERE A.TEST_ID != NULL

SELECT
    t1.number,
    CASE
        -- 숫자 0-9 (10개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 9 THEN CAST((t1.number % 76) + 1 AS CHAR)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 10 THEN '0'

        -- 영문 대문자 A-Z (26개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 35
            THEN CHAR(ASCII('A') + ((t1.number % 76) - 11))

        -- 영문 소문자 a-z (26개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 61
            THEN CHAR(ASCII('a') + ((t1.number % 76) - 37))

        -- 한글 가-하 (14개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 63 THEN '가'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 64 THEN '나'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 65 THEN '다'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 66 THEN '라'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 67 THEN '마'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 68 THEN '바'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 69 THEN '사'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 70 THEN '아'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 71 THEN '자'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 72 THEN '차'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 73 THEN '카'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 74 THEN '타'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 75 THEN '파'
        ELSE '하'
        END as number2
FROM (
         SELECT (@row := @row + 1) as number
         FROM information_schema.tables A
                  CROSS JOIN information_schema.tables B,
              (SELECT @row := 0) AS r
         LIMIT 300000
     ) t1;
SELECT TL_ID AS CD , TL_NM AS CD_NAME FROM quadmax_sdz.T_TARGETLIST WHERE TL_ID like 'SV%' ORDER BY TL_ID DESC

SELECT CUR_CD AS CD
     , CUR_CD AS CD_NAME
   FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.NDMRT206TH
 GROUP BY CUR_CD 
     , CUR_CD

SELECT A.STATE_GRADE_CD AS CD
     , A.STATE_GRADE_NM AS CD_NAME
  FROM QUADMAX_SDZ_MART.Z_CUST_INFO A
 GROUP BY A.STATE_GRADE_CD
        , A.STATE_GRADE_NM

SELECT A.AGE_DIV1_CD AS CD
     , A.AGE_DIV1_NM AS CD_NAME
  FROM QUADMAX_SDZ_MART.Z_CUST_INFO A
 GROUP BY A.AGE_DIV1_CD
        , A.AGE_DIV1_NM
